## Type

- [ ] feat (new feature)
- [ ] fix (bug fix)

- [ ] iPhone

## Checklist

- [ ] Builds locally (CI also checks this)
- [ ] No developer team id / secrets committed (`DEVELOPMENT_TEAM` stays empty)
- [ ] Conventional Commit title
- [ ] Screenshots/recordings for UI changes (if applicable)
